title: Infosys and Intel expand strategic collaboration for enterprise AI deployments
detailed_summary: Infosys and Intel announced the next phase of their strategic collaboration on March 03, 2026 to help enterprises move AI pilots into production at scale. The collaboration combines Infosys Topaz Fabric, described as a purpose-built agentic services suite and multi-layer AI fabric, with Intel's high-performance, energy-efficient compute platforms. The companies plan to co-innovate on designing, developing, optimizing, and benchmarking AI workloads across Intel Xeon processors, Intel Gaudi AI accelerators, and Intel AI PCs. The collaboration focuses on scalable, secure, cost-efficient enterprise AI deployments, open standards across the edge-to-cloud stack, and mission-critical use cases including IT operations, developer productivity, and automation workflows.

key_facts.fact: The collaboration emphasizes right-sized AI architectures intended to balance performance, security, and total cost of ownership for mission-critical use cases including IT operations, developer productivity, and automation workflows across industries.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally

key_facts.fact: The combined solution is intended to support AI agents that can access enterprise data, coordinate tasks, and operate with appropriate controls across complex and regulated environments powered by Intel's compute platforms.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, and Intel, a global leader in computing innovation, today announced the next phase of their strategic collaboration to help enterprises move from AI pilots to production at scale.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally

important_text_spans.text: Together, Infosys and Intel are co-innovating on the design, development, optimization, and benchmarking of AI workloads across Intel® Xeon® processors, Intel® Gaudi® AI accelerators, and Intel® AI PCs.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the technical scope and Intel platforms involved.

important_text_spans.text: The collaboration emphasizes 'right-sized' AI architectures that balance performance, security, and total cost of ownership - unlocking predictable and production-ready outcomes for mission-critical use cases like IT operations, developer productivity and automation workflows across industries.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and Intel Deepen Strategic Collaboration to Unlock AI Value for Enterprises Globally
